local_results.title: Haywire
local_results.description: 3-story spot for Texas cuisine & whiskey. Each level has unique offerings with a 1st floor whiskey bar, 2nd floor dining room & rooftop patio.
local_results.user_review: "Great food, greater drinks, top-notch service, astounding atmosphere!"

local_results.title: Kanny's Restaurant and Lounge
local_results.description: Family-owned restaurant in the Walnut Street Mall serving traditional Nigerian cuisine and cocktails amid a cozy atmosphere.
local_results.user_review: "Just had a meal here food, atmosphere, was great service was amazing."

local_results.title: Luke's
local_results.open_state: Closes soon · 2 PM · Opens 8 AM Sun
local_results.hours: Closes soon · 2 PM · Opens 8 AM Sun
local_results.description: Relaxed eatery for Southern-inspired staples including biscuits, grits, pancakes and pies.
local_results.user_review: "Great service, yummy food, atmosphere was beautiful and inviting!"

local_results.title: Texas Cafe Diner Greenville
local_results.description: Casual, no-frills diner with a Texas-inspired menu of pancakes, omelets and chicken dishes.
local_results.user_review: "The food was delicious and the atmosphere was very welcoming."

local_results.title: Bavarian Grill
local_results.description: Lively German beer garden/restaurant. A costumed staff, polka band & big beer selection fuel the festive mood at this German eatery.
local_results.user_review: "The server was very helpful and gave wonderful beer and food recommendation."

local_results.title: Windmills Craftworks [Grandscape]
local_results.description: Sleek brewpub with global eats & music. Streamlined microbrewery & international eatery featuring regular live music & patio seating.
local_results.user_review: "The menu is innovative and the items we ordered were delicious."

local_results.title: Sister Restaurant
local_results.description: Cozy, elegantly decorated restaurant offering Italian fare with a Mediterranean twist, plus wine and cocktails.
local_results.user_review: "Everything was exceptional from the service, the drinks, to the food."

local_results.title: Nina's Brunch
local_results.description: Modern diner for daytime favorites. Contemporary eatery with booth seats dishing up breakfast & lunch classics, along with mimosas.
local_results.user_review: "Our server Star was very attentive and friendly and the food was delicious."

local_results.title: Wings Over USA - Fate
local_results.user_review: "Spacious booths, good food and Kymiah provided great service!"

local_results.title: Quartino Ristorante
local_results.address: 5754 Grandscape Blvd Ste 200, The Colony, TX 75056
local_results.description: Italian eatery featuring thin-crust pizzas and pastas as well as a wine list and happy hour.
local_results.user_review: "The food, ambience, service, and aesthetics were all on point."

local_results.title: SI Señor Tex-Mex Restaurant
local_results.description: Relaxed Tex-Mex eatery featuring familiar brunch and dinner staples such as fajitas, tacos and enchiladas.
local_results.user_review: "Wonderful service, ambiance, and delicious food that came out hot and fast."

local_results.title: La Hacienda Ranch
local_results.description: Tex-Mex dining & frozen margaritas. Longtime cantina favored for homestyle Mexican fare & margaritas in bright, festive surroundings.
local_results.user_review: "Service was great, our drinks never ran dry, and food was fantastic."

local_results.title: Old Damascus Mediterranean Restaurant
local_results.description: Authentic eatery for Middle Eastern classics such as shawarma, kabsa and hummus, plus tea.
local_results.user_review: "The vibe was intimate and cozy and the food was delicious."

local_results.title: Lazy Dog Restaurant & Bar
local_results.description: Casual spot for global comfort eats. Relaxed, lodge-chic chain serving global comfort fare, including stir-fries, pot roast & pastas.
local_results.user_review: "Absolutely divine, hand crafted food, beautiful drinks with amazing flavor."

local_results.title: Bucky's Cafe
local_results.description: Home-cooked comfort food joint. Homestyle local diner serving scratch-made comfort eats, from waffles to burgers in casual digs.
local_results.user_review: "Service was still great, the food was wonderful,  and the atmosphere good."

local_results.title: Umi Umi
local_results.description: Relaxed spot for a range of rolls along with ramen, bento boxes and poke.
local_results.user_review: "The food comes out in very gorgeous plating and as delicious as it looks!"

local_results.title: Onassis Greek Taphouse + Kitchen
local_results.address: 760 W Ralph Hall Pkwy #120, Rockwall, TX 75032
local_results.description: Brand-new restaurant offering a variety of Greek comfort food, plus beer, wine, and cocktails.
local_results.user_review: "Our food was incredible and our waitress, Emma, gave amazing service."

local_results.title: Tayta Peruvian Restaurant
local_results.user_review: "Every dish is packed with incredible flavor and plated beautifully."

local_results.title: Cattlemans Cafe
local_results.address: 120 W James St, Blue Ridge, TX 75424
local_results.description: Down-to-earth restaurant serving steak, pies and burgers, along with breakfast options and lunch items.
local_results.user_review: "The steak was cooked perfectly and seasoned just right."

local_results.title: Ferah Tex-Med Kitchen
local_results.description: Texas spin on Mediterranean cuisine. Friendly spot for Texas spin on Mediterranean favorites, including gyro quesadillas & falafel tacos.
local_results.user_review: "The food, atmosphere, service and drinks are always consistent and amazing!"
